site.title: Bug N' Out LLC
site.description: Professional, fast, and reliable pest control solutions for residential and commercial properties throughout Central Pennsylvania.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDesc: Control of common household pests including ants, roaches, spiders, and more.
services.description: We provide general pest control services for common household pests. Interior and exterior treatments available.
services.description2: Flexible scheduling options to fit your needs.

services.title: Termite Treatment
services.shortDesc: Protect your property from termite damage with professional treatment.
services.description: Professional termite inspections and treatment services. We identify infestations and provide appropriate treatment solutions.
services.description2: Pre-construction treatments available for new builds.

services.title: Rodent Control
services.shortDesc: Eliminate rats, mice, and other rodent problems.
services.description: Rodent control services including inspection, trapping, and exclusion to eliminate current infestations and prevent future ones.

services.title: Commercial Services
services.shortDesc: Tailored pest management for businesses of all sizes.
services.description: Customized pest management programs for businesses with flexible scheduling.

services.title: Wildlife Removal
services.shortDesc: Removal of nuisance wildlife from your property.
services.description: Wildlife removal services to safely remove animals from your property and prevent them from returning.

services.title: Bed Bug Treatment
services.shortDesc: Effective bed bug elimination for homes and businesses.
services.description: Bed bug treatment services. Multiple treatment options available for complete elimination.
